description: Headquarters is a performing arts venue on Broad Street in Nevada City.
The Cauldron is a 'Community - Apothecary - Ritual Supplies' shop at Loot and Lore on West Main Street in Grass Valley. It pairs a physical storefront with an online shop.
Black Bart Ornamental Iron Works is an ornamental iron maker on Gold Flat Road in Nevada City.

Heathered Yarn Co. is a yarn shop on West Main Street in Grass Valley built around its own hand-dyed yarn. The shop also carries knitting tools, patterns, project bags, and fiber for embroidery and cross stitch, and offers in-person knitting instruction.
Punk and Bunny Tattoo is a tattoo studio on East Main Street in Grass Valley.
Sweet Spirit Tattoo is a custom tattoo studio in Nevada City. The studio works from Providence Mine Road.

KNCO is a Grass Valley radio broadcaster carrying 'NewsTalk' programming with local and national news. Its studios sit on East Main Street, with community features like weather and listener call-in segments.

Nevada County Gold is a regional guide to Grass Valley, Nevada City, and the surrounding county. Its coverage runs from 'Festivals & Events' and dining to lodging, outdoor recreation, and 'California Gold Rush Stories', alongside its Gold print magazine.
Ron's Real Records is a record store on Mill Street in Grass Valley. The shop stocks 'Rare & Affordable Records, Tapes, Discs & Tons of Toys & Fun Collectibles'.
The Union is a news publication serving Grass Valley and Nevada County from Sutton Way. Its sections span local news, business, education, environment, prep and community sports, and entertainment.

The Grass Valley Museum occupies 'a historic nunnery and orphanage' on South Church Street, with Victorian-era furniture, art, clothing, instruments, and artifacts. The grounds include Saint Joseph's Chapel and the Russell Rose Garden with 'over 100 heritage roses, trees, and plants'.
North Star House is a wedding and event venue on Auburn Road in Grass Valley. It is featured in MUSE's 'Architect Julia Morgan's Legacy in Nevada County'.
Uncle Rob's Cabin is a historic place on Seven Cedars Drive in Grass Valley.
Atra Nova is a shop on Broad Street in Nevada City.
Crystal Empire Gems is a crystal and gem shop on Mill Street in Grass Valley.

Elevate Athleisure is a Mill Street shop in Grass Valley built around 'Fitness.Comfort.Wellness.Beauty'. It carries women's and men's activewear, yoga mats and studio supplies, and bath and body products from brands like Free People Movement, Beyond Yoga, and Manduka.
Gather & Mill is a shop on West Main Street in Grass Valley.

Inner Path is a nonprofit spiritual shop and center on Commercial Street in Nevada City, carrying 'meditation accessories, yoga supplies, the teachings of Paramahansa Yogananda and other spiritual teachers'. The center also holds group meditations, a healing room, a library, and a boutique.
La Cache is a shop on Broad Street in Nevada City.
Main Street Kids sells 'new and consignment children's clothing and toys' on Main Street in Nevada City. Its curated selection runs from newborn sizes up to teens.
Mint is a shop on Mill Street in Grass Valley.
Nevada City Crystal & Glass Shop is a crystal and glass shop on Broad Street in Nevada City.
Shiva Moon is a shop on Main Street in Nevada City.
The Fates Fine Jewelry is a fine jewelry shop on Broad Street in Nevada City.
Wild Side is a shop on Mill Street in Grass Valley.
A public sculpture stands at the Madelyn Helling Library on Helling Way in Nevada City.
Vintage on Mill is a vintage shop on Mill Street in Grass Valley.
Truth Tattoo is a tattoo studio in 'Historic Downtown Truckee' on Jibboom Street. The shop offers artist consultations, and 'Walk-Ins Always Welcome'.
Tahoe Guide is a lifestyle and events publication covering the Lake Tahoe region. Its sections range from hiking, skiing, and boating to local makers, live music, theater and dance, and dining.
Whole Treats Bakery & Coffee House is a bakery and coffee house on Palisades Drive in Truckee.
Lorien Powers Studio Jewelry is a custom jewelry studio on Donner Pass Road in Truckee.

Bespoke & Atelier is a yarn and fiber-arts shop on Donner Pass Road in Truckee, where 'Bespoke and Atelier are now united in one light, bright and beautiful location'. Shelves carry yarns from Malabrigo, Noro, Shibui, Knitting for Olive, and more.
Juniper Boutique is a boutique shop on Donner Pass Road in Truckee.
Mo, Jo & Zoe is a shop on Donner Pass Road in Truckee.

The Cooking Gallery is a family-owned kitchen shop on Donner Pass Road in Truckee, in business since 1972 and now in its second generation. It stocks 'high-quality cooking and kitchen products' with expert advice to match.
truckee love. is a shop on Donner Pass Road in Truckee.
'El Dragon' is a bike rack artwork on South Shore Drive in Truckee, part of the area's public art.
